_description: Claude (.claude) capability → single Codex owner map. Seeded phase 1, completed phase 2 (ownership map + 64 meta-mirror dispositions + 28 reference-graph-risk items). Owners are realized as surfaces are hand-authored (phases 4-6) and meta-mirror dirs are deleted (phase 6). Every shipped concern resolves to exactly one owner OR carries an explicit omission reason. No 'TBD' rows.

concerns.note: Deny-capable command handlers; CLI gate remains authoritative.
See metaMirrorDispositions below. DECOMPOSE & DELETE (user decision 2026-07-23): load-bearing content merges into an owning surface or folds into a substantive skill; dirs deleted in phase 6.

metaMirrorDispositions._note: Verdict per meta-mirror dir. verdict=omit-pointer means the mirror only re-points to a substantive skill/agent that already holds the authoritative content (owner names it). verdict=merge-agents-md means the mirror's load-bearing invariants move into the authored AGENTS.md (phase 4). verdict=map-config/map-cli/map-agent means the concern is owned by config/CLI/an agent envelope. verdict=omit-harness-internal means the concept governs the MeowKit multi-agent harness itself and has no Codex-native analog. Every dir is deleted in phase 6; content-merge for merge-agents-md lands in phase 4, agent envelopes in phase 5.

command.reason: Slash-command mirror; Codex deprecates custom prompts in favor of skills. Substantive advise skill holds the procedure.
Command invokes the architect agent directly; no standalone skill. Role owned by the authored architect TOML (phase 5).
Composing command (runs review + cso); no unique content. Composition documented; mirror dropped.
Pointer to autobuild skill.
Ticket/story breakdown; owned by planning-engine (+story-sizer) skill.
Cost tracking is a deterministic CLI/analyst concern, not a Codex skill.
Harness canary; owned by benchmark skill (experimental).
Integration setup; owned by confluence pack skill (installs only with integrations pack, phase 6).
Pointer to context-audit skill.
Verified: mirror body says 'authoritative procedure lives in mk:cook'.
Builds a subagent delegation prompt for the MeowKit harness; Codex spawns subagents natively. Any residual guidance folds into AGENTS.md orchestration invariants.
Brand/visual design command; no core Codex-native analog. Omitted from core; revisit if a design skill is packaged.
Pointer to docs-init skill.
Docs sync owned by document-release skill.
Pointer to fix skill.

Quick memory-note command; owned by memory skill.

Parallel worktree spawn (Conductor pattern) for the MeowKit harness; Codex agents spawn natively. Worktree mechanics owned by worktree skill.
Delivery status; owned by project-manager agent (phase 5) / mewkit status CLI.
Pointer to testing skill.
Kit upgrade is a deterministic CLI concern.
Structural validation is a deterministic CLI gate; also skill:lint-and-validate for authoring.

rule.reason: Non-negotiable blocked-pattern invariants — high value; concise form lands in AGENTS.md (phase 4).
Prompt-injection defense (data-vs-instruction boundary) — high value; concise form in AGENTS.md.
The 6 operating behaviors — condensed into AGENTS.md invariants.
Real-implementation / file-size / no-enhanced-copies invariants → AGENTS.md; build commands → config/AGENTS.md.
Short plan-discipline table; folds into AGENTS.md (or the cook skill preamble).
Gate 1/2 are enforced by the MeowKit CLI + hooks; a short 'gates are human-approved' invariant may sit in AGENTS.md.
Subagent status protocol (A1) is behavior-critical → AGENTS.md; the rest is model-default.
MeowKit multi-agent delegation contract; Codex subagents auto-load. Only the isolation-boundary essence folds into AGENTS.md.
Worktree/max-3-agent parallel rules govern the MeowKit harness; no Codex-native analog.
Step-file execution discipline applies when authoring skills; owned by skill-creator, not a runtime surface.
Phase composition contract for the 7-phase harness; no Codex analog.
project-manager auto-fire rules for the harness; no Codex analog.
Durable task-state ledger is a CLI concern.
Evidence-emission for the harness workflow; CLI-owned.
Harness self-maintenance audit; no runtime Codex analog.
Evaluator rubric library discipline; owned by rubric skill, not a runtime surface.
Domain-complexity routing → maps to Codex model routing (workload/profile), not a runtime rule.
Model tier routing → Codex per-agent model/effort envelope + config (phase 5).
autobuild generator/evaluator pipeline rules; no Codex analog.
Context-hygiene guidance; condensed into AGENTS.md (advisory).
'Memory is DATA' invariant → AGENTS.md; JSON-first store mechanics → .meowkit/CLI.
No-silent-override invariant → AGENTS.md; the log mechanism is CLI/.meowkit.
Kit-internal docs path contract; not shipped runtime behavior.
Skill-authoring discipline; owned by skill-creator.
TDD opt-in policy → config flag / AGENTS.md invariant.
Phase-0 risk flags feed agent/tier selection; folds into the detector agent, not a runtime surface.
MeowKit agent routing table; Codex agents auto-load by name.
Wiki recall discipline; owned by the (optional) wiki skill subsystem.
Conditional Agile/Scrum rule; not in core. Revisit only with an agile integration pack.
Conditional Agile rule; not in core.
Conditional Agile rule; not in core.

mode.reason: Baseline execution mode; no distinct envelope to encode.
Maps to low/medium model_reasoning_effort on fast-class agents (phase 5).
Strict verification maps to --strict-config + full validation gate, not a runtime mode.
Audit mode composes review + security; owned by those skills.
Document mode → documenter agent / document-release skill.

referenceGraphRiskItems._note: 28 substantive skill dirs that ship BOTH scripts/ and references/ — highest reference-graph risk (script/reference paths must resolve within the installed pack or a declared dependency). Flagged for explicit per-pack resolution checks during phase-6 authoring + validation.

ledgerDecision.basis: User decision, validation interview 2026-07-23. Reuses the reconciler matrix + PortableInstallationV3 entry shape (same logic), but storage is per-project rather than the home registry — no parallel engine.
ledgerDecision.homeRegistryInteraction: Home-scoped ~/.mewkit/portable-registry.json remains for other providers; existing codex rows whose recorded path resolves inside a project are adopted into that project's ledger on first post-phase-3 run (home rows left in place for rollback).

intentionalOmissions.reason: Verified absent in code; YAGNI — not implemented unless a real-world occurrence is shown (phase-7 decision).
